featuredVideo.title: THE TERMINUS
featuredVideo.label: Official Trailer
featuredVideo.description: A custom Starfield adventure featuring a legendary sword, a new boss encounter and the story of Cassilia.

timeline.title: Personal Logs started on a preview branch
timeline.text: A new place for development notes, Cassilia Universe fragments and small creator moments began taking shape.

timeline.title: Cassilia Uniform reached 3700 downloads
timeline.text: A small milestone for the Cassilia Universe and a useful reminder that the quiet work adds up.

timeline.title: Connected Codex to GitHub
timeline.text: The website workflow moved into preview branches, making future updates easier to shape and review.

timeline.title: Released THE TERMINUS
timeline.text: A weapon idea became a full Starfield adventure with a location, boss encounter and Cassilia story thread.
